dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.setupIncompleteDescription: Finish setting up your business profile to unlock all features

dashboard.gettingStartedSubtitle: Complete these tasks to explore Mugdm
dashboard.taskUploadDocument: Upload a document to the vault
dashboard.insightsError: Could not load insights. Please try again later.
dashboard.tourWelcomeDesc: This is your dashboard — your central hub for managing your Saudi micro-business. Let us show you around.
dashboard.tourComplianceDesc: Track all your regulatory deadlines here — GOSI, ZATCA, CR renewals, and more. Never miss a filing date.
dashboard.tourDocumentsDesc: See your document health at a glance. Valid, expiring soon, or expired — all tracked automatically.
dashboard.tourFinancialsDesc: Your monthly money in and money out, with net position. Click to dive into your bookkeeper.
dashboard.tourQuickActionsDesc: Upload documents, log transactions, check your calendar, or view your profile — all one click away.
dashboard.healthDescription: Based on obligations, document validity, and linked proof.
dashboard.tourChatDesc: Your AI-powered assistant. Ask anything about your business — compliance status, expenses, documents, and more.

hero.description: Mugdm handles your documents, deadlines, bookkeeping, and team — so you can focus on what matters: growing your business. Think of it as an AI-powered COO that never sleeps.

features.title: Stop juggling. Start growing.
features.subtitle: Documents, deadlines, bookkeeping, and team — handled by one AI-powered platform so you can focus on what actually makes you money.

vault.title: Document Vault
vault.description: Never lose a document again. Upload your CR, GOSI certificates, Zakat clearance, and insurance once — access anywhere, and get reminded before anything expires.

calendar.title: Compliance Calendar
calendar.description: GOSI, ZATCA VAT, CR renewal, Zakat filing — every deadline tracked and every reminder sent automatically. Sleep easy knowing nothing slips through the cracks.

bookkeeper.title: AI Bookkeeper
bookkeeper.description: Snap a receipt, upload a bank statement — done. AI categorizes every transaction, flags government payments, and keeps your VAT numbers ready before ZATCA asks.

team.title: Team Management
team.description: Track employees, Iqama renewals, and your Saudization ratio in one place. Stay ahead of Ministry of Labor requirements without the spreadsheet chaos.

howItWorks.title: From zero to smarter in 3 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No training. No onboarding calls. Just sign up and let Mugdm do the heavy lifting.

step1.title: Sign Up
step1.description: One email, one click. No passwords, no friction — you're in.

step2.title: Upload Your CR
step2.description: Drop in your Commercial Registration. AI reads it, extracts your details, and builds your business profile instantly.

step3.title: Auto-Generate Obligations
step3.description: Mugdm maps out every obligation — GOSI, ZATCA, Chamber renewal — and sets the exact deadlines. You didn't have to look up a single one.

step4.title: Run Your Business
step4.description: Reminders before every deadline. Bookkeeping on autopilot. You run the business — Mugdm runs the back office.

why.title: Built by a Saudi founder, for Saudi businesses
why.subtitle: The smartest investment you'll make for your business. Here's why.

affordable.title: Affordable, Not Cheap
affordable.description: A fraction of the cost of hiring a COO or accountant. Mugdm gives you enterprise-grade operations at a price that makes sense for small businesses.

ai.title: AI That Actually Works
ai.description: Not a chatbot. Mugdm's AI reads your documents, categorizes transactions, and flags what needs attention — no manual data entry, no prompts to write.

saudi.title: Knows Saudi Regulations
saudi.description: GOSI, ZATCA, Balady, Chamber of Commerce, CR renewals — built with deep knowledge of every Saudi compliance requirement. No generic templates.

replaces.title: Replaces 5+ Tools
replaces.description: Document storage, compliance tracking, bookkeeping, team management, reminders — all in one bilingual dashboard with Arabic, English, Hijri, and Gregorian dates.

contact.title: Ready to run your business smarter?
contact.subtitle: Questions, feedback, or just want to say hello — we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.successMessage: We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

footer.tagline: The operating system for Saudi micro-enterprises

demo.title: See Mugdm
demo.subtitle: One dashboard, one vault, one AI assistant — everything your business needs.

chat.assistantMessage1:
Your compliance score is 92%. You have 3 upcoming deadlines:

- GOSI Payment due May 10
- VAT Return due May 15
- Chamber Renewal overdue since Mar 1

I recommend renewing your Chamber membership ASAP to avoid penalties.
chat.userMessage2: What's the penalty for late Chamber renewal?
chat.assistantMessage2: Late Chamber of Commerce renewal typically incurs a fee of SAR 500-2,000 depending on your business type. I'd recommend scheduling it this week.

testimonials.title: Trusted by
testimonials.subtitle: See what Saudi entrepreneurs are saying about Mugdm.

ahmed.name: Ahmed S.
ahmed.quote: Mugdm replaced my Excel spreadsheets and my accountant's monthly visits. I save 10+ hours a week.

sarah.name: Sarah M.
sarah.quote: The AI bookkeeper caught a duplicate GOSI payment I would have missed. Paid for itself in the first month.

khalid.name: Khalid R.
khalid.quote: Finally, one place for all my compliance documents. No more WhatsApp reminders to myself.

pricing.title: Simple pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale as you grow. Every plan includes AI-powered compliance, bookkeeping, and document management built for Saudi businesses.
pricing.freeDesc: Get started with the essentials. No credit card required.
pricing.proDesc: Everything you need to run your business like a pro.
pricing.bizDesc: For teams that need full power and dedicated support.

onboarding.pageSubtitle: Connect your business to ZATCA Fatoora for Phase-2 e-invoicing.

intro.title: Before you begin
intro.subtitle: We'll link your business to ZATCA so invoices clear automatically. This takes about 5 minutes.
intro.bullet1: We generate a secure cryptographic key pair on our servers — your private key is encrypted at rest.
intro.bullet2: We submit a sample invoice to ZATCA's compliance sandbox to verify the setup.
intro.bullet3: On success, we issue a 1-year production certificate and remind you 30 days before it expires.
intro.consent: I authorize Mugdm to generate and manage a ZATCA certificate on my business's behalf.

credentials.title: Business tax details
credentials.subtitle: Enter the VAT and Commercial Registration numbers ZATCA has on file.
credentials.vatHint: 15 digits, starts with 3 and ends with 3 (e.g. 300000000000003).
credentials.crHint: 10 digits as shown on your CR certificate.

otp.title: Enter ZATCA OTP
otp.subtitle: Generate a one-time password from the ZATCA Fatoora portal to authorize certificate issuance.
otp.step1: Log in to the ZATCA Fatoora portal with your TIN credentials.
otp.step2: Open 'Onboard new solution / device' and generate an OTP.
otp.step3: Copy the OTP and paste it below — it expires in 60 minutes.

compliance.title: Setting up your certificate
compliance.subtitle: Hang tight — this usually takes 10-30 seconds.

done.title: You're all set
done.subtitle: Your ZATCA production certificate is active. You can now issue e-invoices that clear automatically.
done.reminderNote: We'll remind you 30 days before expiry to renew.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please verify your details and try again.

certExpiry.warningBody: Your e-invoicing certificate expires in {days} days. Renew now to avoid service interruption.
certExpiry.criticalBody: Only {days} days left before your e-invoicing certificate expires. Renew immediately.
certExpiry.expiredBody: Your e-invoicing certificate expired {days} days ago. New invoices may be blocked — renew now.
